title: cynoglossum leptophyllum
intro: Cynoglossum leptophyllum, also known as slender tongue flower or slender gypsy flower, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Cynoglossum leptophyllum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
